input: directed heterogeneous graph with user launch/join behaviors and social network
output: ranked list of items for initiating a group-buying
backbone: graph convolutional network with multi-view embedding propagation
key_idea: model group-buying as a directed heterogeneous graph and use multi-view propagation to capture launch/join behaviors and social relations
datasets: real-world group-buying dataset (collected from Pinduoduo-like platform)
